rulings.Case Title: LOTHAR R. THEILEN SR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDENTS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Ntc Of Mo & Mo To Allow Use Of Lothar Theilen Testimony Provided On January 10, 2013, Regarding Parex Usa, Inc., Exposures As Evidence In This Action
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Monday, November 17, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' Motion To Allow Use Of Lothar Theilen Testimony Provided On January 10, 2013, Regarding Parex Usa, Inc., Exposures As Evidence In This Action is continued, on the Court's own motion, to November 20, 2014 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. No reservation was made with the department and it has been this Court's practice that no hearings are scheduled on Mondays. Plaintiff to give notice to defendant about the new hearing date and to deliver a set of courtesy copies of the moving papers to the Department no later than November 17, 2014 by noon. = (503/TLJ)
